title: Antilla privigna
benefits: Antilla privigna is actually a type of ant, and as such, it is not typically discussed in terms of its health benefits. However, certain species of ants have been studied for their potential medicinal properties. Ants, in general, have been found to have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties due to their secretions and compounds. These properties are thought to have potential applications in the development of new medicines. Further research is needed to fully understand the health benefits of ants and their related compounds.
parts: Antilla privigna is a species within the family Rubiaceae. Unfortunately, there is limited information available about its medicinal parts. The plant is often used to treat various health conditions, including fever and respiratory issues. Further research is needed to confirm the specific medicinal parts of Antilla privigna.
